# passwork_item (Data Source)

Fetches a Passwork password item by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "passwork_item" "db" {
  id = "abc123def456"
}

output "db_login" {
  value = data.passwork_item.db.login
}

output "db_password" {
  value     = data.passwork_item.db.password
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Item identifier.

### Read-Only

- `custom_fields` (Attributes List) Custom fields. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_fields))
- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `folder_id` (String) Folder the item belongs to.
- `login` (String) Username / login.
- `name` (String) Display name.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password value.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags.
- `url` (String) Associated URL.
- `vault_id` (String) Vault the item belongs to.

<a id="nestedatt--custom_fields"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_fields`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Field name.
- `type` (String) Field type.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Field value.
